channel.title: Elegant Stitches by SewSonia on Elegant Stitches by SewSonia | Bridal & Formalwear
channel.description: Recent content in Elegant Stitches by SewSonia on Elegant Stitches by SewSonia | Bridal & Formalwear

item.title: About
item.description: About SewSonia SewSonia, I bring dreams to life through personalized bridal and formalwear alterations. As a dedicated seamstress with a passion for craftsmanship and detail, I specialize in creating fit-for-you tailored gowns, and personalized alterations that celebrate your unique style and silhouette. Whether you’re walking down the aisle or attending a special event, my goal is to make you feel confident, comfortable, and beautiful. From intricate lacework to timeless silhouettes, every piece is thoughtfully crafted with love, precision, and a deep understanding of fabric and fit.

item.title: Contact
item.description: Contact I’d love to hear about your vision for your special day or event. Whether you’re interested in a custom design, need alterations, or just have questions about my services, please don’t hesitate to reach out. Consultation Requests To schedule a consultation, please fill out the form below. Initial consultations are $25 (applied to your service when booked) and typically last about 30-90 minutes. Full Name * Email Address * Phone Number Interested In * Please select.

item.title: Services
item.description: Services At SewSonia, I offer a comprehensive range of services to ensure you look and feel your absolute best for your special day or formal event. Bridal Alterations Transform your wedding dress dreams into reality with expert alterations to make your wedding dress fit you perfectly. Comprehensive Alterations: Including bodice adjustments, hem alterations, bustle addition, and structural changes Minor Alterations: Strap adjustments, simple hems, and minor fitting issues Timeline: 2-3 months before wedding date recommended Price Range: Starting at $xxx-$yyy, based on assessment of required alterations Formalwear & Special Occasion Custom-designed dresses and alterations for all your special events.
